mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE role = 'USER'
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(pay_amount), 0) FROM t_order WHERE status IN ('PAID', 'SHIPPED', 'COMPLETED')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_order WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d.day, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, IFNULL(COUNT(o.id), 0) AS value FROM (SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL seq DAY AS day FROM (SELECT 0 AS seq UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6) days) d LEFT JOIN t_order o ON DATE(o.create_time) = d.day GROUP BY d.day ORDER BY d.day

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d.day, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, IFNULL(SUM(o.pay_amount), 0) AS value FROM (SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL seq DAY AS day FROM (SELECT 0 AS seq UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6) days) d LEFT JOIN t_order o ON DATE(o.pay_time) = d.day AND o.status IN ('PAID', 'SHIPPED', 'COMPLETED') GROUP BY d.day ORDER BY d.day

SELECT oi.product_name AS name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS value FROM order_item oi INNER JOIN t_order o ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE o.status IN ('PAID', 'SHIPPED', 'COMPLETED') GROUP BY oi.product_id, oi.product_name ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 5
